name: OPC 53 Grade Cement
description: Ordinary Portland Cement Grade 53 as per IS 269:2015. High strength cement suitable for all types of construction.

name: PPC Fly Ash Cement
description: Portland Pozzolana Cement with fly ash as per IS 1489 (Part 1):2015. Better workability and durability.

name: PSC Slag Cement
description: Portland Slag Cement as per IS 455:2015. Excellent for marine environments and mass concrete.

name: TMT Steel Bars Fe 500
description: Thermo-Mechanically Treated bars Fe 500 grade as per IS 1786:2008. High strength reinforcement steel.

name: TMT Steel Bars Fe 550
description: High strength TMT bars Fe 550 grade for heavy structural work as per IS 1786:2008.

name: TMT Steel Fe 500D
description: Ductile TMT bars Fe 500D for earthquake-resistant structures as per IS 1786:2008.

name: AAC Blocks (600x200x300)
description: Autoclaved Aerated Concrete blocks. Lightweight, thermally efficient masonry units.

name: Clay Bricks (Kerala)
description: Traditional Kerala clay bricks (burned bricks) for masonry work.

name: Fly Ash Bricks
description: Compressed fly ash bricks. Eco-friendly alternative to clay bricks.

name: Laterite Stone (Kerala)
description: Traditional Kerala laterite stone for masonry and cladding.

name: Manufactured Sand (M-Sand)
description: Manufactured sand from crushed granite. IS 383:2016 compliant.

name: 20mm Coarse Aggregate
description: Crushed stone aggregate 20mm size for concrete and RCC work.

name: Recycled Concrete Aggregates
description: Aggregates from recycled concrete. Sustainable alternative to virgin aggregates.

name: Vitrified Tiles
description: Double-charged vitrified tiles for flooring. Low maintenance, high durability.

name: Granite Slabs
description: Natural granite stone slabs for flooring, countertops, and wall cladding.

name: Teak Wood
description: Premium teak wood for doors, windows, and furniture. Naturally termite resistant.

name: Bamboo Composite Boards
description: Engineered bamboo boards for interiors, furniture, and partitions. Carbon negative material.

name: Glass Fiber Reinforced Concrete (GFRC)
description: Lightweight concrete reinforced with glass fibers. High strength, versatile shapes.

name: Rockwool Insulation
description: Mineral wool insulation for thermal and acoustic insulation.

name: XPS Insulation Board
description: Extruded polystyrene foam insulation. High compressive strength.

name: Clay Roofing Tiles (Kerala)
description: Traditional Kerala clay roofing tiles (Mangalore tiles). Time-tested durability.

name: Metal Roofing Sheets
description: Color-coated steel roofing sheets. Long span, low maintenance.

name: UPVC Door System
description: UPVC door frames and shutters. Weather resistant, low maintenance.

name: Aluminum Door System
description: Powder-coated aluminum door systems. Lightweight and durable.

name: Weather Shield Exterior Paint
description: Premium exterior emulsion with weather protection and anti-fungal properties.

name: Plastic Emulsion Interior Paint
description: Interior emulsion paint. Washable and stain-resistant.

name: Tempered Glass
description: Toughened safety glass. 5x stronger than regular glass.

name: Tile Adhesive
description: Cement-based tile adhesive for floor and wall tiles. High bond strength.

name: Cementitious Waterproofing
description: Crystalline waterproofing compound for basements and water tanks.

name: Hollow Concrete Blocks
description: Concrete masonry units with hollow cores for structural and non-structural walls.

name: Porotherm Clay Blocks
description: Perforated clay blocks for walls. Excellent thermal insulation and faster construction.

name: Rubber Wood
description: Treated rubber wood for furniture and interiors. Cost-effective hardwood alternative.

name: Ceramic Wall Tiles
description: Glazed ceramic tiles for bathroom and kitchen walls.

name: Plastering M-Sand
description: Fine manufactured sand for plastering work. IS 1542:1992 compliant.

name: Marble
description: Natural marble stone for premium flooring and cladding.

name: Kota Stone
description: Limestone from Kota, Rajasthan. Popular for flooring and stairs.

name: Glasswool Insulation
description: Fiberglass insulation for thermal and acoustic applications.

name: Ferrocement
description: Thin-wall reinforced concrete using wire mesh. Lightweight and versatile.

name: Asphalt Shingles
description: Bitumen-based roofing shingles for sloped roofs.

name: Concrete Roofing Tiles
description: Cement-based roofing tiles. Durable and versatile.

name: Steel Door System
description: Galvanized steel door frames and shutters. High security.

name: Wooden Door System
description: Solid wood door with frame. Traditional and aesthetic.

name: Laminated Glass
description: Safety glass with PVB interlayer. Stays intact when broken.

name: Insulated Glass Unit (IGU)
description: Double/triple glazed units for thermal and acoustic insulation.

name: Epoxy Grout
description: Chemical resistant epoxy grout for industrial floors and tile joints.
